name: Minecraft (Lewd RPG)
description:
This is intended to be complete Minecraft with a mild twist to everything to lean towards being lewd. All combat situations can be resolved by you fucking the assailant. There are other players in the world(though rare).

This is set to be my most complete bot.

Let me know of any issues, and please make some public chats so I can figure out problems. Thank you! 🖤
